content: For 2025 swarm UAV autonomous agents powered by ICM curiosity mechanisms, working memory capacity limits can be repurposed as a hidden driver of targeted, useful exploration rather than just a cognitive bottleneck. Agents with constrained working memory will only encode and assign intrinsic reward to the most observationally distinct novel targets, preventing aimless over-exploration of redundant minor environmental variations that plagues unconstrained ICM systems.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
